Detect and prevent counterfeit components with accredited [AS6171](https://aaactl.com/services/counterfeit-mitigation/as6171/)/[AS6081](https://aaactl.com/services/counterfeit-mitigation/as6081/) testing and reporting.

products.name: Hi-Reliability Testing & Space Qualification
products.descriptor: Integrated hi-rel and space qualification program covering TVAC, RadHard, shock/vibration, and DPA

evidence.snippet: Radiation Hardness Assurance (RadHard) is one of the four core pillars of AAA’s Hi-Rel & Space Qualification program, alongside [TVAC](https://aaactl.com/services/hi-rel-space-qualification/thermal-vac/), [Shock & Vibration](https://aaactl.com/services/hi-rel-space-qualification/shock-vibration-testing/), and [DPA](https://aaactl.com/services/hi-rel-space-qualification/dpa/).

products.name: EMI/EMC Testing
products.descriptor: Electromagnetic interference and compatibility testing per MIL-STD-461 and DO-160

evidence.snippet:
EMI / EMC Testing
=================
![Ultralog high gain EMC electromagnetic compatibility radiated emissions antenna](https://aaactl.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/AdobeStock_791137235.webp)
EMI / EMC Testing Services

EMI/EMC testing is commonly performed to [**MIL-STD-461**](https://aaactl.com/mil-std-461/), platform-specific military requirements, DO-160, and other customer-defined specifications. AAA executes customer-defined test plans and focuses on controlled execution, traceable results, and audit-ready reporting to support program reviews, qualification documentation, and anomaly

products.name: Shock & Vibration Testing
products.descriptor: Mechanical integrity testing of EEE components per MIL-STD-810 and MIL-STD-883

evidence.snippet:
Shock & Vibration Testing
=========================
![](https://aaactl.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/drop-shock.jpg)
Principles and Applications in High-Reliability Environments

Shock & Vibration Testing is one of AAA’s four core Hi-Rel & Space Qualification programs, alongside [Thermal Vacuum (TVAC) Testing](https://aaactl.com/services/hi-rel-space-qualification/thermal-vac/), [Radiation Hardness Assurance (RadHard)](https://aaactl.com/services/hi-rel-space-qualification/radhard/), and [Destructive Physical Analysis (DPA)](https://aaactl.com/services/hi-rel-space-qualification/dpa/).

products.name: MIL-STD-883 Testing
products.descriptor: Microcircuit test methods per MIL-STD-883 including burn-in, temperature cycling, and seal testing

evidence.snippet: *   MIL-STD-883 Testing
*   **Burn-In Testing**: Eliminates early failures via electrical bias at elevated temperatures, per MIL-STD-883 Method 1015.

products.name: MIL-STD-461 Testing
products.descriptor: EMI/EMC testing of equipment to MIL-STD-461 requirements for defense systems

evidence.snippet: *   [MIL-STD-461](https://aaactl.com/mil-std-461/)

products.name: Radiation Hardness Assurance (RadHard)
products.descriptor: Radiation hardness testing and analysis for space and defense electronics

evidence.snippet:
Radiation Hardness Assurance (RadHard)
======================================
![SmallSat in orbit](https://aaactl.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/CubeSat.webp)
Have Questions?

Radiation hardness testing exists to confirm that electronic components and systems retain functionality in both natural space and man-made radiation environments. At AAA Engineering & Test Lab, we partner with our exclusive network to qualify FPGAs, ASICs, SoCs, and discretes for space, aerospace and defense.

products.name: PEM Qualification & Screening for Hi-Reliability Components
products.descriptor: Plastic encapsulated microcircuit qualification and screening per NASA PEM-INST-001 and MIL-PRF-38535

evidence.snippet:
PEM Qualification & Screening for
Hi-Reliability Components
=============================================================
![image of good bond wires during PEM qualification and MIL-STD-883 testing](https://aaactl.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/bond-wires-analysis.webp)

PEM qualification and screening ensure that plastic-encapsulated microcircuits (PEMs)—the dominant packaging format for modern integrated circuits—meet the stringent reliability requirements of space, aerospace, and defense applications. At AAA Engineering & Test Lab, we deliver comprehensive, in-house PEM qualification and screening services aligned with NASA PEM-INST-001, MIL-PRF-38535 Class N/Y, and MIL-STD-883 test methods.
